scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix product-service && npm install --prefix order-service && npm install --prefix payment-service && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:user" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:payment" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:frontend"
